ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departures" (
  "departure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departure */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the departure city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the departure city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the departure city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the departure city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("departure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrivals" (
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrival */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the arrival city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the arrival city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the arrival city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the arrival city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "carrier_description" TEXT /* Description of the carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rail_cars" (
  "rail_car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rail car */,
  "rail_car_type" TEXT /* Type of rail car (e.g., Box, Intermodal) */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Ownership of the rail car (e.g., Foreign, System, Private) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the rail car */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the rail car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rail_car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freight" (
  "freight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freight */,
  "freight_type" TEXT /* Type of freight (e.g., Coal, Grain, Intermodal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the freight */,
  "weight_unit" TEXT /* Unit of weight (e.g., tons, pounds) */,
  "volume_unit" TEXT /* Unit of volume (e.g., cubic feet, liters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "departure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure city */,
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival city */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carrier */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "train_type" TEXT /* Type of train (e.g., Passenger, Freight) */,
  "train_length" INTEGER /* Length of the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_arrival_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_id") REFERENCES arrivals ("arrival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_departure_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_id") REFERENCES departures ("departure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_cars" (
  "train_car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train car */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "rail_car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rail car */,
  "freight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the freight */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the freight */,
  "car_value" REAL /* Value of the freight */,
  "damaged" REAL /* Damage to the freight */,
  "loaded" INTEGER /* Whether the car is loaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_cars_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_cars_freight_id FOREIGN KEY ("freight_id") REFERENCES freight ("freight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_cars_rail_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("rail_car_id") REFERENCES rail_cars ("rail_car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_usage" (
  "fuel_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel usage */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "fuel_used" REAL /* Amount of fuel used */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_usage_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "departure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure city */,
  "arrival_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival city */,
  "miles" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., Direct, Indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_departure_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_id") REFERENCES departures ("departure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_arrival_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_id") REFERENCES arrivals ("arrival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speeds" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "speed_type" TEXT /* Type of speed (e.g., Coal Unit, Grain Unit) */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeds_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dispatcher, logistics manager, customer service representative) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_status" (
  "train_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train status */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the train (e.g., on_time, delayed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_status_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)
